mapper.sql: c.id, c.name, c.grade_level, c.teacher_id, c.status, c.create_time, c.modify_time, c.deleted, u.real_name as teacher_name
mapper.select:
select
from t_class c left join t_user u on u.id = c.teacher_id where c.id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.insert: insert into t_class (id, name, grade_level, teacher_id, status, create_time, modify_time, deleted) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gradeLevel,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{teacherId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{deleted,jdbcType=BIT})

insert into t_class
id, name, grade_level, teacher_id, status, create_time, modify_time, deleted,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gradeLevel,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{teacherId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{deleted,jdbcType=BIT},
mapper.update: update t_class set name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, grade_level = #{gradeLevel,jdbcType=INTEGER}, teacher_id = #{teacherId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, deleted = #{deleted,jdbcType=BIT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select:
select
from t_class c left join t_user u on u.id = c.teacher_id
and c.deleted = false

select
from t_class c left join t_user u on u.id = c.teacher_id
and c.deleted = false and c.status = 1
order by c.id desc
